task:
Implement Layer 1 foundation tasks for the SQLite migration feature in gid-rs (/Users/potato/clawd/projects/gid-rs/).

5 tasks (no inter-dependencies, all are root tasks):

1. **storage-error**: Define StorageError enum and StorageOp variants per design-storage.md §4
2. **node-struct-extend**: Extend Node struct with 14 new fields (file_path, lang, signature, node_type, description, priority, assigned_to, line_start, line_end, body, parent_id, depth, complexity, is_public) per design-storage.md §12
3. **edge-struct-extend**: Add `metadata: Option<serde_json::Value>` to Edge struct per design-storage.md §12
4. **graphstorage-trait**: Define GraphStorage trait with all method signatures from design-storage.md §3
5. **sqlite-schema**: Create SQLite schema DDL (nodes, edges, node_metadata, node_tags, knowledge, config, change_log tables + FTS5 virtual table + triggers)

Design docs are at: /Users/potato/clawd/projects/gid-rs/.gid/features/sqlite-migration/
- design.md (master overview)
- design-storage.md (primary reference for all 5 tasks)

Existing source code is at: /Users/potato/clawd/projects/gid-rs/crates/gid-core/src/
The current Node and Edge types are in the graph types module — find and extend them.

All new code should go in: /Users/potato/clawd/projects/gid-rs/crates/gid-core/src/storage/ (create this module)
Except Node/Edge extensions which modify existing type definitions.

After implementation, run `cargo check` and `cargo test` to verify.
